[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010010101 4
1 000000100 1
2 001111001 5
3 010001110 4
4 110011100 5
5 000001011 3
6 001000000 1
7 010010011 4

01 10 001111001 5 match 2
12 21 010001110 4 match 3
23 32 110011100 5 match 4
34 43 000001011 3 match 5
45 54 001000000 1 match 6
56 65 010010011 4 match 7
67 76 110110111 7
70 07 000000100 1 match 1

02 20 011110111 7
13 31 100010010 3
24 42 110010111 6
35 53 001001011 4
46 64 011010011 5
57 75 100100100 3
60 06 110110011 6
71 17 001111101 6

47 74 101100100 4
50 05 100100000 2
61 16 111001010 5
72 27 011110011 6
